description: Use the test_driven optimizer to improve the complaint-generator document generation phase. Target files: document_optimization.py. Phase goal: Improve drafting handoff so complaint generation reflects the collected facts, exhibits, and unresolved gaps at formalization time. Recommended actions: Carry blocker-closing intake answers directly into factual allegations, claim support, and exhibit descriptions so drafted complaints preserve timing, actor identity, and causation sequence.; Gate document generation on graph completeness signals and surface unresolved factual or legal gaps in drafting readiness before formalization.; Carry canonical fact ids, support traces, and artifact-backed support rows through drafting so the complaint text is grounded in traceable evidence.. Weak complaint types to generalize for: housing_discrimination, hacc_research_engine. Weak evidence modalities to improve: policy_document, file_evidence. Focus only on document_optimization.py. Target symbols: _build_workflow_phase_targeting.
